description: Hallucinated (unknown-name) tool call emitted as content -- the VERBATIM payload llama3:8b leaked to the user on 2026-06-09 (get_bearing_replacement_procedure is not on the dispatch surface). Provenance: U6/R9 shape-based detection, pinned by tests/unit/agent/test_authority_gates_validity.py::TestLoopLeakHandling::test_hallucinated_tool_is_suppressed_never_executed. Suppressed immediately at the loop seam: never shown raw, never executed, never re-entered. NOTE: is_fallback is false -- the loop-seam suppression returns the fallback TEXT, and the structured flag is set only when the _finalize_turn backstop itself substitutes the text (pinned inconsistency, see corpus README).
user_messages: How do I replace the bearing on P-201?
